chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-765 of 2023 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.3148/2023 (Ex/A) 3. For hearing of CMA No.3149/2023 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 08.09.2025 ************** 1. Deferred. 2. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3&4. None present for the petitioner, nor any intimation received. Same was the position on 04.05.2023. Further perusal of the record reflects that no efforts have been made by the petitioner to proceed with the matter. It appears that the petitioner is not interested in pursuing the instant petition. In the circumstances, present Constitution Petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
